Describe the sequence of cleaning actions performed by the vacuum cleaner on the carpet.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the blue vacuum head moves forward across the beige carpet; at 4s, the dark grey nozzle maintains contact with the textured surface; at 8s, the vacuum removes dirt leaving a cleaner path behind; at 10s, a distinct clean line appears as the wand angles right; at 18s, the attachment centers on the carpet.

canonical_answer: A black leather cushion and ottoman base rest on the carpet.
